meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building demos. Escape tutorial hell with this advanced SaaS starter kit checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your launch.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By leveraging a production-ready SaaS starter kit, you bypass boilerplate fatigue. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for rapid implementation, allowing you to focus exclusively on business logic, user acquisition, and monetization strategies instead of configuration.
content.intro:
You are drowning in a sea of 'To-Do list' tutorials while your competitors are capturing market share. Every hour spent configuring Auth, Stripe webhooks, or database schemas is a revenue-generating hour lost. The difference between a hobbyist and a founder is the speed at which they move from idea to billable state.

This guide is your tactical extraction from tutorial hell. We are stripping away the fluff and focusing on a high-velocity workflow that treats your codebase as a product, not a classroom exercise. It is time to stop learning how to build and start building to scale.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-First Architecture
steps.description: Establish the core entity relationship model that directly supports your monetization strategy before writing a single line of application code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Architect a multi-tenant SaaS schema focusing on Stripe subscription states, user roles, and organization-level data isolation. Ensure PostgreSQL compatibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --blueprint 'SaaS Multi-tenant Base' --features 'Auth, Billing, Team-Management'

steps.title: Automate the Authentication Layer
steps.description: Don't roll your own auth. Implement a secure, scalable identity provider that integrates seamlessly with your dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication flow using Supabase Auth with Row Level Security (RLS) policies for individual and team access.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe for Immediate Monetization
steps.description: Your MVP is worthless without a payment gateway. Setup webhooks and subscription tiers now.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a Stripe webhook handler for subscription events including checkout.session.completed and invoice.payment_succeeded to update user tiers.

steps.title: Implement Rapid Feature Iteration
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold CRUD operations so you can focus on the unique value proposition of your SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a standardized API route structure for a CRUD-heavy resource, including input validation and error handling.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Pipeline
steps.description: Establish a CI/CD pipeline that ensures your code is always in a deployable state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to a managed hosting provider.

pro_tips: Treat your starter kit as a product: keep a 'CHANGELOG.md' for your own architecture decisions to avoid technical debt.
Always build for multi-tenancy from day one, even if you are B2C; it is harder to refactor for B2B later.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your Stripe webhooks; revenue-critical code must have 100% coverage.
Focus on 'Time to First Dollar' over 'Time to Perfect Code'; ship the payment flow before the design.
Automate your database migrations using Antigravity; manual SQL scripts are the primary cause of production outages.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up a feedback loop with five potential users to validate your core value proposition before adding more features.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of building. Start building for the sake of revenue. You have the tools, the architecture, and the roadmap. The only variable left is your execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
